match.userMessage:
Handheld camera tracks backward at eye level as Scarlett finishes placing the tube into her canvas tote, slings the strap over her shoulder, turns, and walks out through the open doorway. The door swings shut behind her. Bright sunlight slices across the marble floor. Soft breeze lifts loose strands of hair and shifts the tote fabric as she exits.

gentle ocean waves and light breeze through open door. soft thud of tube dropping into tote, fabric rustle of tote strap, door hinges creak then latch click.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
